misc: His usual shot shape could be described as a "power draw".
biography: Jussi, representing St. Laurence Golf, has established himself as a familiar presence at the Hector Trophée, having participated in four previous editions of this esteemed pair competition. While his journey will pause for the Hector Trophée 2026, his contributions to the tournament's competitive spirit remain noteworthy.

His game is distinctively characterized by a commanding 'power draw', a testament to his forceful approach and ability to shape shots with precision from the tee. Despite wielding such a potent and consistent shot, Jussi continues his pursuit of a maiden victory. Neither the coveted Hector Trophée team title nor the prestigious individual Victor Trophy has yet been claimed across his four appearances, underscoring the formidable challenge presented by the tournament's high level of competition.

Although Jussi will not be among the field for the upcoming 2026 event, he retains an active engagement with the Hector series. The golfing community will undoubtedly look forward to his potential re-entry in subsequent years, keen to observe if his signature powerful play will ultimately lead him to the long-sought accolades that have, thus far, eluded his grasp.
